All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AuditEntity
Base class for entities that require audit fields.
AuthRestClient
Implementation of IAuthRestClient for interacting with the auth service API.
ContextPropagationFilter
A filter that extracts request context information from HTTP headers and stores it in a ThreadLocal variable for the duration of the request.
ContextService
ContextService is responsible for handling user context related operations.
ControllerExceptionHandler
Controller advice class to handle exceptions thrown by controllers.
CustomException
Custom exception class to handle exceptions with custom messages and HTTP status codes.
ErrorApi
Error API DTO class.
GetUserService
Implementation of the IGetUserService interface for retrieving user information.
HeaderPropagationInterceptor
An interceptor that propagates headers from the RequestContext to outgoing HTTP requests made by RestTemplate or other HTTP clients.
IAuthRestClient
Service interface for authentication REST client.
IContextService
Service interface for accessing and validating user context information.
IGetUserService
Service interface for retrieving user information.
IRegisterUserService
Service interface for user registration operations.
IUpdateUserService
Service interface for updating user information.
IUserService
Service interface for user-related operations.
MappersConfig
ModelMapper and ObjectMapper configuration class.
NgoDocument
Entity representing documents submitted by an NGO for validation.
NgoDocumentStatus
Enum representing the status of NGO documents.
NgoEntity
Entity representing a Non-Governmental Organization (NGO).
NgoStatus
Enum representing the verification status of an NGO.
OpenApiConfig
Configuration class for OpenAPI settings.
RegisterAuthDto
DTO for user registration request.
RegisterUserService
Implementation of the IRegisterUserService interface for user registration operations.
RequestContext
A class to hold request-specific context information using ThreadLocal storage.
RestTemplateConfig
Configuration class for RestTemplate settings.
TokenResponseDto
DTO for token response.
UpdateUserService
Implementation of the IUpdateUserService interface for updating user information.
UserController
Controller for handling user-related requests.
UserEntity
Entity representing a user in the system.
UserLoginResponseDto
Data Transfer Object representing a user with their roles.
UserRegisterDto
DTO for user registration request.
UserRepository
Repository interface for managing UserEntity entities.
UserRole
Enum representing different user roles in the system.
UserRoleEntity
Entity representing the many-to-many relationship between users and roles.
UserRolId
Composite primary key for UserRolEntity (user_id + rol).
UserService
Implementation of the IUserService interface for user-related operations.
UserServiceApplication
Main application class for the User Service.
UserStatus
Enum representing the status of a user account.
UserUpdateDto
Data Transfer Object for updating user information.
